name: Rosetta
tagline: First spacecraft to orbit a comet (67P)
description: ESA’s comet rendezvous mission. Caught up to Comet 67P/Churyumov–Gerasimenko in August 2014, deployed the Philae lander (which bounced and fell into a crevasse), and accompanied the comet through its 2015 perihelion before crash-landing on the surface itself in September 2016.
best_known_for: First spacecraft to orbit a comet (67P)
